name: Amazon sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month, inconsistent supplier performance causes late orders and penalties. We provide a benchmarking tool instead of manual tracking.
problem_solved: Inconsistent supplier performance leading to late orders and penalties.
features: Supplier performance scoring based on delivery metrics
Quality assessment tools for supplier evaluation
Cost comparison features for supplier selection

locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking of supplier performance metrics.
